items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the exploratory step regarding the split payment scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario where a payment is split between two cards. However, the provided evidence does not include any specific details or outcomes related to this scenario, nor does it confirm whether the system supports such a payment method. The existing evidence focuses on booking confirmations and customer interactions but lacks the necessary context to assess the split payment functionality.
